content_summary: Bar plot showing the number of sequenced cells per organ for FACS (23 organs) and droplet (16 organs) across 6 age groups from 19 male and 11 female mice.
Annotation workflow schematic showing how the Tabula Muris 3-month reference was used for semi-automated cell-type classification of the full dataset.
UMAP plots of all 356213 cells coloured by organ/Louvain cluster and by age after bbknn batch correction.
B cells and endothelial cells independently annotated per organ cluster together by unbiased Louvain clustering irrespective of tissue of origin or processing method.
Fraction of cells expressing Cdkn2a and mean expression of Cdkn2a in expressing cells across age groups for both FACS and droplet methods.
Relative cell-type composition changes in bladder with age (mesenchymal vs urothelial) and top 20 up/downregulated genes in bladder using MAST differential expression.
Relative abundance changes of kidney cell types (capillary endothelial, mesangial, loop of Henle epithelial) with age and top 20 up/downregulated genes in kidney.
Relative abundance changes of spleen T cells and plasma cells with age and top 20 up/downregulated genes in spleen.

Distribution of pairwise differences in mean somatic mutation counts between age groups across all tissues and five functional cell-type groups using FACS full-length transcript data and ERCC spike-in controls.
B cell receptor assembly and clonotype analysis for 6050 B cells across 3 FACS time points showing increasing clonality with age.
T cell receptor assembly and clonotype analysis for 6000 T cells across 3 FACS time points showing increasing clonality with age.
Diversity scores for brain myeloid microglial cells (FACS) and kidney macrophages (droplet) showing significant changes with age.
UMAP of brain myeloid microglial cell Leiden clusters coloured by age showing age-dependent cluster composition changes.
UMAP of brain myeloid microglial cells scored using the Alzheimer's disease microglia signature showing overlap with ageing signature.
UMAP of kidney macrophage Leiden clusters coloured by age group showing young (clusters 10) vs old (cluster 13) macrophage states.
Description of single-cell RNA sequencing of more than 350000 cells from male and female C57BL/6JN mice across 6 age groups and 23 tissues using droplet and FACS methods.
Description of semi-automated cell-type annotation using Tabula Muris as reference; 110824 FACS and 245389 droplet cells passed filtering; bbknn batch correction and Louvain clustering.
Global analysis of gene expression changes with age; comparison of single-cell and bulk RNA-seq; analysis of Cdkn2a expression fraction and level changes with age; senescence marker analysis.
Changes in bladder cell-type composition with age including mesenchymal decline and urothelial increase; differential gene expression supporting compositional observations.
Age-related decrease in mesangial cells, capillary endothelial cells, and loop of Henle epithelial cells; Atp1a1 and Umod expression changes.
Decrease in T cell proportion and increase in plasma cells with age in spleen; upregulation of Cd79a and Jchain and downregulation of Cd3d.
Decline of T cell population in mammary gland with age; upregulation of AP1 transcription factors (Junb, Jund, Fos).
Age-related decrease in hepatocytes; increased immune signature; Il1b expression in Kupffer cells; Mrc1 expression in LSECs; in situ RNA validation.
GATK-based somatic mutation calling on FACS full-length transcript data showing age-related increase in mutations across organs; ERCC spike-in controls used for validation.
B cell receptor and T cell receptor reconstruction from FACS data using singlecell-ige and TraCeR; increasing clonality of B and T cell repertoires with age.
Shannon entropy-based diversity score analysis identifying brain myeloid microglia and kidney macrophages as cell types with significant age-related diversity changes.
Age-dependent cluster composition changes in brain microglia; upregulation of MHC class I and interferon-responsive genes; overlap with Alzheimer's disease microglial signature.
Age-dependent shift from M2-like (cluster 10) to M1-like proinflammatory (cluster 13) macrophage states in kidney.
UMAP visualizations of all FACS cells (110824) and all droplet cells (245389) coloured by tissue, age, and organ with Louvain cluster overlays.
B cells and endothelial cells clustering together across organs and technologies in FACS, droplet, and combined datasets.
Pie charts with summary statistics for FACS and droplet datasets showing total cells sequenced and cells passing QC.
Box plots of number of genes detected per cell and number of reads per cell for each organ and age in FACS.
Box plots of number of genes detected per cell and number of UMIs per cell for each organ and age in droplet.
Balloon plot showing number of sequenced cells per method per organ per sex per age.
Schematic of the analysis workflow for data processing.
Colour dictionaries for organs/tissues and ages used throughout the paper.
Comparison of bulk and single-cell ageing patterns showing that bulk gene expression changes can be explained by cell count and/or read count changes in FACS and droplet data.
Mammary gland T cell relative abundance change with age and top 20 up/downregulated genes in mammary gland.
Marrow precursor B cell relative abundance change with age and top 20 up/downregulated genes in marrow.
Skin keratinocyte stem cell relative abundance change with age and top 20 up/downregulated genes in skin.
Relative abundance of liver hepatocytes changing significantly with age.
Bright-field imaging and quantification of hepatocyte cell size and number at different ages.
Top 10 up/downregulated genes in liver computed using MAST with age as continuous covariate.
Gene expression of Il1b and Clec4f in the liver droplet dataset across six ages.
In situ RNA staining of Kupffer cells (Clec4f/Il1b) at different ages with quantification showing increased Il1b-positive Kupffer cells with age.
Gene expression of Pecam1 and Mrc1 in the liver droplet dataset across six ages.
In situ RNA staining of LSECs (Pecam1/Mrc1) at different ages with quantification showing increased Mrc1-expressing LSECs with age.
Mean number of somatic mutations in genes and ERCC spike-in controls across all tissues per age group comparisons (3m vs 24m, 3m vs 18m, 18m vs 24m).
Gene raw expression and ERCC spike-in control raw expression across all tissues per age group comparisons to control for sequencing coverage.
B cell clonal family tree structures for each time point and mouse showing organ-of-origin composition.
T cell clonal family tree structures for each time point and mouse showing organ-of-origin composition.
Heat map summaries of overall tissue diversity score and tissue cell-type diversity score for FACS and droplet.
Diversity score at different cluster resolutions for FACS brain myeloid microglia and droplet kidney macrophage.
Diversity score correlation with number of genes expressed per tissue and tissue cell-type showing no confounding.
Trajectory analysis (PAGA) for brain myeloid microglia cells showing ageing trajectory.
Heat map of differential gene expression between young (cluster 10) and old (cluster 13) kidney macrophages showing M2 vs M1 signatures.
Description of sequence demultiplexing (bcl2fastq), alignment (STAR for FACS, CellRanger for droplet) to mm10plus genome, and gene count generation (HTSEQ).
Filtering criteria (minimum 250 genes, 5000 counts for FACS, 2500 UMIs for droplet), normalization, PCA, clustering (Louvain/Leiden), UMAP, and bbknn batch correction.
Semi-automated annotation using Tabula Muris 3-month reference with PCA, Louvain/Leiden clustering, and manual curation by tissue experts.
Computation of relative cell-type proportions per tissue and age with linear regression against age.
MAST linear model treating age as numerical variable controlling for sex and technology with FDR threshold of 0.01 and age coefficient threshold of 0.005.

location: Methods - Comparison between bulk and single-cell datasets
content_summary: Analysis comparing log2 fold-changes of cell and read counts from single-cell data with Spearman correlation of bulk DESeq2 normalized expression.
TraCeR v0.5 used to identify T cell clonal populations from FACS data.
singlecell-ige used to identify B cell clonal populations from FACS data.

PAGA used to reconstruct ageing trajectory in brain microglial cells.
Shannon entropy of cluster assignment regressed against age for each tissue and tissue-cell type using 6 clustering configurations.
